openaiBaseUrl.label: Chat completions endpoint
openaiBaseUrl.help: Full chat completions URL. Defaults to local Ollama. Use https://api.openai.com/v1/chat/completions for OpenAI.

openaiModel.label: Model
openaiModel.help: Model for knowledge extraction. Defaults to llama3.2 (Ollama). Use gpt-4o for OpenAI.

openaiApiKey.label: API Key
openaiApiKey.help: API key. Leave unset for Ollama (no key needed). Set to sk-... for OpenAI. Supports ${OPENAI_API_KEY}.

dataDir.label: Data directory
dataDir.help: Where ConversationMemory persists its SQLite index.
